entry.title: Re: Question about email send out when copying class
entry.content:
Hi Lik,

that the checkbox is marked is very stupid. If you copy a class all agenda sequences, instructors and classrooms will be copied into the new class an if the checkbox is marked the instructor will receive all information from the old class for the new class. It is better you deactivate the checkbox before you copy the class. Then modify everything in the new class. When you have finished, send the instructor a mail using actions in the class.

Regards
Guido

entry.title: Re: My Home in SAP S/4HANA Cloud – Your business Insights at a glance.
entry.content: If you create a card from a List Report, has that Card been created somewhere in that application or elsewhere? Or can you create these cards "on the fly" via "Add Card to Insights"?

entry.title: purchase responcible
entry.content:
Hello friends
I ran into a problem. Is it possible to specify a person as the person responsible for the purchase while creating the purchase request, so that later only that person will be responsible for creating the purchase order?

purchase responsible as a feild in pr 

 

thanks regard

entry.title: Re: SAP User Experience Update: What’s New for SAP S/4HANA 2023 (Private Cloud and On-Premise)
entry.content: Is the new MyHome still planned for SAP S/4HANA 2023 (on-premise) in Q1/2024?

entry.title: Re: Business Partner configuration while doing conversion from ECC to HANA.
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing, much appreciated.

Kind regards,

Alaa Afifi

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Happy to have you here in SAP Community @Adeem - maybe you already know about the Paris group? You could connect locally there and learn about events nearby!

entry.title: Re: Asset Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition 2023
entry.content:
Hello @pardhreddyc 

The permit management in PTW(the new solution with Fiori) or the classical one with WCM caters to the overall permit solution (creation, preparation, implementing safety controls, approval, print out, handout and closure). This is typically required by oil n gad, chemicals, utility type industry.

When it comes to order integration, you can connect the order- operations with one or more permit. However, order release is not intended to be controlled by permit management. One can automate setting "Order IN Process - EXEC status" within WCM setup, but not restrict order release. Order release is more guided by the maintenance and logistics processes (for ex. Procurement of a high lead item material may depend on early release of work order etc).

One can develop custom checks to control “order release” based on a processing state of the permit in WCM.

Hope it helps.

Arvind

entry.title: Re: Using ALV, Can I display multiple sales document that...
entry.content:
Yes it is possible, you need use conditional loop to search all sales orders related to the material number,  use append statement to add all related records once finished use Modify statement otherwise your internal tale it will keep one record only (your current scenario) 

example logic using 2 loops: 

Loop AT it_output INTO WA_it_output
LOOP AT it_salesdoc WHERE (  matnr =  WA_it_output-matnr  ) INTO  wa_it_salesdoc_final

APPEND wa_it_salesdoc to it_salesdoc_final.

ENDLOOP.
ENDLOOP.
MODIFY it_salesdoc_final.

You may achieve the same result with different approach you are not limited to the above. 

Please reward if it was helpful.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Show Popup after O...
entry.content: @N1kh1l any Ideas?

entry.title: Re: B1IF 2.0 - Add records into UDT type no object via ServiceLayer
entry.content: Dear Ankit CHAUHAN, Thanks...

entry.title: Re: I've got problems with CPILint , I need HELP !!
entry.content: Happy to help! I'm adding an FAQ to GitHub and this is one of the questions. Basically, after the unified Integration Suite UI, you can no longer copy the hostname from the browser on Cloud Foundry. Instead. you have to copy it from a service key. The approach is described here: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/http-calls-and-uri-components

entry.title: Re: Enable "convert to new ticket" for e-mails initiated...
entry.content: Unfortunately, this is not helping... The resolution is my description of the system behaviour for customer emails. Nothing described to employee emails...

entry.title: Re: Check Printing with multiple printers
entry.content:
Hi Barry ,

to answer your question straight away yes it is possible to print checks in different locations via Output rules.

Additionally for checks in my bank accounts you can assign different queues for different check lots.

I hope that answers the question a bit.

Best regards

Didi

entry.title: Key Takeaways from Rise Into the Future Event: What You Need to Know
entry.content:
Recently, the Rise Into the Future event showcased the success stories of leading companies that made the move to the cloud and reaped the benefits of increased agility and innovation. 

In this blog, we will delve into the key takeaways from the event and explore how these organizations thrived in the digital era by embracing RISE with SAP. 

 

Hear RISE with SAP from customer stories from different industries 

Several world-renowned SAP customers across various industries were highlighted in the virtual event showcasing their successful transition to the cloud: 

  • Nestlé consolidated their data into SAP RISE data centers, resulting in improved system availability and agility for their 273,000 employees. 
  • Inchcape, a major automotive distributor, experienced a 40-50% increase in system communication speed and improved customer service through cloud solutions.  
  • Mahindra focused on modernizing their operations with RISE with SAP, resulting in increased developer efficiency and faster time to market.  
  • Versuni, a consumer products company, re-implemented all systems with RISE with SAP, enabling greater responsiveness and continuous technology adoption.  

Each company reported significant benefits from their migration to the cloud. 

 

How can I reach my sustainability goals? 

Modern businesses are facing increasing pressure from customers, investors, employees, and regulators to follow strict emission mandates and tight regulations. With this pressure from various stakeholders that all demand to prioritize sustainability and more environmental responsibility, companies are turning to technologies to help them track and manage their sustainability efforts.  

SAP’s Jan Gilg explained that “With Green Ledger, SAP S/4HANA Cloud becomes the heart of the sustainable enterprise. This enables businesses to monitor the costs upfront, prompting them to make key decisions about the value chain more proactively.” 

It is clear that by tintegrating sustainability practices into their core operations, businesses not only meet regulatory mandates but also lead the way for a more environmentally conscious future. 

 

The answer is always AI, what’s the question? 

SAP’s new generative AI assistant, Joule was also showcased at the event, showing how it is integrated across SAP's entire enterprise portfolio. This enables businesses to eliminate repetitive and time-consuming tasks for their employees, enhancing processes from human resources to finance, supply chain, procurement, and customer experience. 

SAP’s Jan Gilg explained: “We are committed to helping your business drown out the noises and challenges associated with running a successful business. For example, liquidity challenges, supply chain fragility, rising energy costs, talent shortages, or changing government regulations amid geopolitical tensions.” 

With Rise with SAP, users can leverage the cloud technologies delivered by SAP and our partners and make use of the benefits of enhanced flexibility, agility, scalability, and cost-effectiveness. to thrive in dynamic business environments.  

 

That sounds easy, but how exactly?  

The recently announced RISE with SAP Migration and Modernization Program was spotlighted as the methodology to help customers optimize, orchestrate, integrate, and automate.  

Eric Van Rossum, SAP's Chief Marketing Officer for Cloud ERP explained: “They need to drive the tangible business outcome, and that changes a lot depending on whether a customer is coming from ECC, or they've already started their S/4 journey, whether on-premises or with a hyperscale”. Van Rossum continued, “The second barrier is the cost associated with infrastructure, services, and maintenance. We are addressing both challenges with the RISE with SAP Migration and Modernization Program.”. 

Every SAP customer’s journey to cloud ERP is different. The expanded RISE with SAP Migration and Modernization Program acknowledges and celebrates these differences. 

As Navneet Mirshra, Global Head of Service Portfolio and Strategy for Cloud ERP explained, “No matter what industry or segment customers belong to, we hear loud and clear from them about the need for a business case, predictability of scale, and return on investment.” 

 

What about ‘Clean Core’? 

“The clean core concept is a mindset.” says Navneet Mishra. It focuses on modern design approaches for business processes, integration scenarios, and data architecture in a stable and transparent platform. A clean core allows for faster software deployment and easier adoption of updates, while also helping to minimize technical debt and prepare organizations for maximizing strategic benefits and cost savings. 

 

“We're committed to helping customers drive tangible business outcomes and reduce costs so they can move forward with confidence.” 

- Eric Van Rossum, SAP's Chief Marketing Officer for Cloud ERP 

 

What does the future of ERP look like?  

There was a great panel of experts who delved into the essential components of successful business transformation: process, people, and products. McKinsey’s Rob Cain emphasized the crucial role of Gen AI and shed light on the importance of strategic decision-making by leveraging cutting-edge technologies to stay ahead in today's competitive marketplace. 

Cain further added: “CEOs and boards are increasingly looking to technology, both legacy investments in technology and potential future investments in technology and digital, especially with Gen AI.”  

Many companies follow traditional innovation cycles and methods for generating ideas and developing products, but they are increasingly embracing technology tools for driving business transformation. Cain explained that the second thing that CEOs and the C-level suite look for is the technology to drive increased productivity to drive greater forms of automation and create opportunities for insights to quicken decision-making. Lastly, the third bucket is the ability to leverage technology for innovation. And ERP is a foundational glue that ties these elements. 

The best boardroom chats should not just be about how to use AI technology, but also about its impact. Executives need to consider how it will affect their customers, employees, community, and the environment. It's important to not only think about how to benefit from AI but also about how to use it responsibly. 

 

How can RISE with SAP migration help? 

In the event, we learnt how the RISE with SAP migration and modernization program helps customers drive tangible business outcomes with their cloud transformation and reduce the associated costs. This migration program is about much more than just moving from on-premise to the cloud.  

Geoff Scott, CEO and Act Evangelist said: “It's also about business process rejuvenation and business process modernization. It's about opening possibilities for your businesses with new technologies, making sure that your business processes match up to what SAP is doing, and making sure that as a customer.” 

A high-tech company Lexmark, one of the event speakers, wanted to improve visibility through greater automation and standardization and get the full benefits of the cloud hyperscalers in terms of stability and security. The company went live in August 2023.  

Yves Gautier, IT director and Lead of the SAP Excellency Team at Lexmark said: “Our SAP S/4HANA database production size was pretty large, around six terabytes for ECC and for BW. SAP at that time had just released a HANA large instance on Microsoft Azure. So, this was the ideal sheet for our complex needs as it was already architected and operationalized by SAP.”  

With the initial migration and the software subscription corresponding to the new needs, Lexmark achieved a %15 reduction of the ongoing total cost of ownership. With Rise with SAP migration, Lexmark harmonized all operating systems with consistent database releases and brought up-to-date support packs. 

SAP is committed to helping your business drown out the noises and challenges associated with running a successful business. With Rise with SAP, you can improve your business processes and consume innovations faster than ever before. Want to learn more? Make sure to watch the Rise Into The Future on demand now! 

 

USEFUL LINKS:

Getting Innovation Ready with Cloud ERP by Eric Van Rossum

Streamline Your Journey to the Cloud with the RISE with SAP Methodology by Peter Baskin

Partners Are Vital to Your Company’s Success When Transitioning to Cloud ERP by George LeBron

entry.title: Re: Generate PFX file to connect SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition to SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Mahesh,

Thanks for putting efforts and publishing very detailed steps as an alternative to the steps provided in help document. I am currently getting error while I am trying to ping web service, I have created in SOAMANAGER for Romania E Document Invoice process. 

I am getting below error:

SRT Framework exception: Service Ping ERROR: Error when calling SOAP Runtime functions: SRT: Processing error in Internet Communication Framework: ("SSL handshake with drcc-test.a1c4955.kyma.ondemand.com:443 failed: SSSLERR_P

Service Ping ERROR: Error when calling SOAP Runtime functions: SRT: Processing error in Internet Communication Framework: ("SSL handshake with drcc-test.a1c4955.kyma.ondemand.com:443 failed: SSSLERR_PEER_CERT_UNTRUSTED (

Error when processing Web service call

Error when calling SOAP Runtime functions: SRT: Processing error in Internet Communication Framework: ("SSL handshake with drcc-test.a1c4955.kyma.ondemand.com:443 failed: SSSLERR_PEER_CERT_UNTRUSTED (-102)Peer's X.509 certificate (chain) validation failed (missing trust?)SapSSLSessionStartNB()==SSSLERR_PEER_CERT_UNTRUSTED  SSL:SSL_read() failed  (536872221/0x2000051d)  => "Failed to verify peer certificate. Peer not trusted."  SSL:SSL_get_state()==0x2131 "TLS read server certificate B"  SSL NI-hdl 250: local=10.193.2.45:29187  peer=52.29.58.141:443  cli SSL session PSE "I:\usr\sap\BDV\D27\sec\SAPSSLC.pse" (load=Sat Mar  2 21:00:06 2024, rcnt= 0)  SSL_CTX ciphersuites=150:PFS:HIGH::EC_P256:EC_HIGH  Client SSL_CTX 000001EFF5C2E4A0 pvflags=896 (TLSv1.2,TLSv1.1,TLSv1.0)  TLSextSNI server_name="drcc-test.a1c4955.kyma.ondemand.com"  Target Hostname="drcc-test.a1c4955.kyma.ondemand.com">> ---- SecuSSL ErrStack: ----Peer not trusted----- BEGIN VERIFICATION RESULT ----- # --- Messages ----------- ERROR: The verified certificate chain is complete but no certificate is trusted. # --- Summary ----------- #01 Certificate (End Entity): VALID  Subject:                      CN=*.a1c4955.kyma.ondemand.com  Issuer:                       EMAIL=support@fortinet.com, CN=FGVM040000173702, OU=Certificate Authority, O=Fortinet, L=Sunnyvale, SP=California, C=US  Fingerprint (SHA256):         44:0B:84:3A:67:7E:99:8A:44:AA:F3:26:7C:F3:D6:38:83:D0:50:08:8F:21:A0:DB:90:6D:1C:A1:5E:38:A3:16  Validity:                     Sat Feb 24 23:06:50 2024 / Fri May 24 23:06:49 2024  PKI validation:               FAILED: Validation of dependents - Issuer Certificate (Issuer - Only Invalid Certificates Found) #02 Certificate (Issuer):     VALID  Subject:                      EMAIL=support@fortinet.com, CN=FGVM040000173702, OU=Certificate Authority, O=Fortinet, L=Sunnyvale, SP=California, C=US  Issuer:                       EMAIL=support@fortinet.com, CN=FGVM040000173702, OU=Certificate Authority, O=Fortinet, L=Sunnyvale, SP=California, C=US  Fingerprint (SHA256):         FD:D0:72:64:60:CF:A3:E8:87:BC:23:89:35:17:5B:CB:14:14:E4:C4:B0:30:12:62:39:51:F9:11:E2:FD:0E:60  Validity:                     Fri Dec  8 15:01:48 2023 / Thu Dec  8 15:01:48 2033  PKI validation:               FAILED   Trusted:                      ERROR: Untrusted - Complete Chain----- END VERIFICATION RESULT -----<< ---------------------------")

Can you guide me where exactly I have missed or made incorrect configuration.

Regards,

Dhruv

entry.title: Re: Wrong image in repeated containers (SEVERAL BUG)
entry.content:
Hi @ramg, a screenshot of the structure of the repeated list would help a lot to understand what is happening and to reproduce the bug if there is one. Is it OK that the formula always points to the first item at index [0] in "Equipos" list?

Could you repeat for debugging purposes a text element from the same list, so that we can see if the problem is in the URL being generated in the wrong way or in the app not reading the URLs correctly?

entry.title: Syntax and usage of several data_source~* in query
entry.content:
Hi,

We can use data_source~* in  OPEN SQL to select all columns from table.

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_750_index_htm/7.50/en-US/abapselect_list.htm#!ABAP_VARIANT_1@1@

But what happens if we have several tables with overlapping column names? For example:

 

 

TYPES:
  BEGIN OF t_output,
    vbeln TYPE vbeln,
    kunnr TYPE kunnr,
    name1 TYPE name1,
    ort01 TYPE ort01,
  END OF t_output,
  tt_output TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_output WITH EMPTY KEY.

DATA:
   output TYPE tt_output.

SELECT FROM vbak LEFT JOIN kna1 ON kna1~kunnr = vbak~kunnr
FIELDS  vbak~*, kna1~*
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE .

 

 

 

VBAK and KNA1 have field KUNNR, which also exists in target area. From what I've observed, it's filled from last table containing this field. So in above example, it will be filled from KNA1. If I were to change order to 

 

 

FIELDS  kna1~*, vbak~*

 

 

it would take field value from VBAK. I've checked SQL Trace and generated query confirms it.

Question is, is it reliable? Can I be sure, that in first example KUNNR will always be taken from KNA1? Or is it effectively random? Is there any documentation about generated query in such cases?

## EDIT

FIELDS  vbak~*, kna1~*, vbak~kunnr

entry.title: Re: Error "OData Server return 401 - Unauthorized error"...
entry.content: To see more details about why the Gateway system refuses the logon, you should increase the ICM trace in the Gateway system: transaction SMICM.

entry.title: Missing graph labels and legend in webi
entry.content:
Dear friends,

from one day to another, all the graphs in our webi reports, have lost the labels and legend.

We suspect of the browser, because we had an update recently and on Webi Rich Client that works fine.

Have you experience something similar recently?

Thanks, best regards

Victor

entry.title: Re: Resize nested table with QR Code in Adobe Form
entry.content:
Try put Subform as a Field 5. And put QR code inside the subform.

That way you can freely position content of subform . For example align it in center (vertically).
But maybe it will not be possible with QR code which is calculated dynamically based on value.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) and PI/PO - Implement an OAuth JWT Bearer Flow on the Example of the
entry.content: @Pushkarpatel05 try adding 'jjwt-impl' to your uploaded .jar files

entry.title: How do i expose SAP CPI IFlow endpoint as authentication none
entry.content: I want to share my SAP CPI iFlow Endpoint URL without any authentication to Sender. Can this be done in SAP CPI without using API Management?

entry.title: Re: Must specify table to select from in Exec saved proce...
entry.content:
Hi,

I recommend that you change the parameter data type in the [dbo].[GIP_SIT_J] stored procedure to DATETIME first. Then please give this a try:

/* select * from OIGE x */
DECLARE @M1 AS DATETIME
SET @M1 = /* x.DocDate */ [%cs1]
Exec [dbo].[GIP_SIT_J] @M1
SELECT * FROM [dbo].[@GIP_SIT_J]

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Sap Business One: Copy "Business Partner Project" to...
entry.content: In FMS, there are 3 values to trigger. You need to choose "When Field Changes", then you can choose Project Code field on the header.

entry.title: Re: MB52 overview + posting date to a specific location
entry.content:
Hi @Mark6 ,

please check TA MB5B for stock on posting date.

entry.title: Guided Tour Link using API Command Not Working
entry.content:
Hi, 

The Guided Tour Link using API command is working perfectly fine when I am in editing mode. But when the SAP Companion is not in editing mode (without 'help-editor=true'), the link does not work anymore. May I know how do I solve this?

entry.title: Re: SAP Java Buildpack 2: Jakarta-Based, Fresh and New!
entry.content:
Hi @Dinu,

That's right - JCo is now supported with SJB 2.

entry.title: Can I upload a own (xls) table in to story reporting in SF and then use kind of a vlookup?
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am looking for a solution where I upload (or create) a list into story reporting and then use sort of a vlookup to use info from this table in a story report. 

Is there any solution or workaround?

thanks,

Jan

entry.title: Re: How to get item descriptions with line breaks into a...
entry.content:
Hi Uwe,

there is no solution in SFL. We have the same problems with all textfields which are used in SFL. Not only the textfields in elements and classes. Also the comment-fields during the registration process. The only way at the moment is that admins follow the rules: not to use any character like * "" ; , | and not to make a break with "enter". But admins forget often the rules and then reports are for the bin again. 

Regards
Guido

entry.title: Re: S4 Attachment Service with DMS: SAP Object Link Tables
entry.content:
Table DRAD is the table linking a DIR (DMS Document Info Record) with a SAP Business object/document (BO type is stored in DRAD-DKOB, The BO document number in  DRAD-OBJKY)

BR, Nico Kuijper

entry.title: Re: Must specify table to select from in Exec saved procedure
entry.content: Please format your code with buttons "..." and "</>", as Johan did.

entry.title: Re: SAP Easy Access - Menu Text missing
entry.content: The text is displayed but is too small. It seems to be a font issue. Please check SAP notes, try other fonts in the customizing, etc.

entry.title: Re: Using ALV, Can I display multiple sales document that is related to a material?
entry.content: If the internal table IT_OUTPUT is used for both storing materials and ALV output, then use one more internal table for only materials, and use IT_OUTPUT for only the ALV output. Simple as that.

entry.title: Re: S4 Attachment Service with DMS: SAP Object Link Tables
entry.content: And other tables that contain the object link between the BO object key and the DIR DMS document are: table DRAD_PORDER (DMS links for Production Orders), DMUD, /KPC/MM_APDO, etc.

entry.title: Re: S4 Attachment Service with DMS: SAP Object Link Tables
entry.content: Please go to SE11, enter data type OBJKY and search for SAP tables where the DMS DIR object key is used. That gives some insight in SAP tables that refer to DMS DIR BO object keys

entry.title: Re: Email Notification If the Job finished successfully i...
entry.content:
@mahioct 

Unfortunately no option to configure email for success status.

 

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Using ALV, Can I display multiple sales document that...
entry.content: Thanks for this. I'm checking on option wherein I can avoid using nested loops.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,
the current version of advanced intercompany stock transer doesn't support multilevel.
Generally it's planned to extend the advanced intercompany processes also to cover the scenario for multi level / single system with one or more additional intermediate companies between the delivering and the selling / receiving company. Currently there is no timeline that can be communicated.
This is a subject to be changed.

Best regards,
Bernd

entry.title: Extended Analysis for Process Flow
entry.content:
Hello Community.
Is it possible to analyze PPI data with extended data range?

For example: I've PPI KPPURCH268 (Frequency: weekly - Reference period: -49 to -21 calendar days) with initial data load december 2023. Actually i've on the system data till 13 Feb2024 (based on weekly data collection). How can i perform analysis from the beginning of 2024 til now (and in the future from the beginning of 2024 to the end of 2024)?

Thanks and regards.

Giuseppe

entry.title: Type Movements List linked to Lot Origin 08 - SAP QM
entry.content:
Hi,

is there a way to know all the moviment type linked to lot origin 08?

In QM customizing there is a table in which you can disable QM for each movement, but firstly i would like to know which Movement Type are linked to lot origin 08 in order to allow creation of inspection lot (with inspection type 08) only for some movement type.

thank you in advance,

Lorenzo

entry.title: Re: ABAP Platform Trial 1909 Available Now
entry.content:
Why the sapstartsrv shows yellow on HANA Studio? 
I already checked everything related to this. Also the SAP note 1639568. 

I already exposed the ports 50213 and 50214.

Everything else is working as expected...

Or this is a normal behavior @julieplummer20 ?

 

All these ports are exposed

entry.title: Re: SAP Java Buildpack 2: Jakarta-Based, Fresh and New!
entry.content: Hi, how will the SAP Memory Calculator ("V1") be supported?

entry.title: Re: create a new product catalog sync that perform only s...
entry.content:
you got the point right.

to answer at your question: no, we don't need strictly the prices versioned but we decided to keep them as them are, consider that there are also others business requirement. One other solution keep in analysis at the beginning was write the prices directly on online catalogue, but it was not the solution chosen.

about the impex: I want create another CatalogVersionSyncJob to synchronise only the priceRow items. I don't know what I need to put on the attributeDescriptor for do that.

this insert below works fine

INSERT_UPDATE CatalogVersionSyncJob ; code[unique=true,path-delimiter=!]      ;sourceVersion(catalog(id),version)     ;targetVersion(catalog(id),version)     ; syncPrincipals(uid) ; removeOnExit ; sessionUser(uid) ; syncLanguages(isocode) 
                                    ; sync $solPrefixPriceRow:Staged->Online  ;$solPrefixProductCatalog:Staged        ;$solPrefixProductCatalog:Online        ; syncuser            ; true         ; syncuser         ; en,it

the insert of SyncAttributeDescriptorConfig below fail

INSERT_UPDATE SyncAttributeDescriptorConfig ; syncJob(code)[unique=true,path-delimiter=!]  ; attributeDescriptor(enclosingType(code),qualifier)[unique=true] ; includedInSync ; copyByValue
                                            ; sync $solPrefixPriceRow:Staged->Online 	   ; XXXXXX:YYYYYYY                                           ; false          ; false

what can I put on attributeDescriptor to create the respective items for update ONLY priceRows?

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Project Creation Error in ADT
entry.content: I am getting the same error, can you please explain what exactly you have updated in ADT?

entry.title: Re: execute listing function from BAPI
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a question why you need to listing per individual store? Because I think you can create general assortment, then you input your all site and MC in here. So when you run wsm8, you choose this general assortment then it's updated for all store.

entry.title: Usage of sales kit CPFH and DISH in on-premise?
entry.content:
Hello,

İn cloud we have option to use 4 types of sales kits as in the picture but when I examine the help page for Hana it shows only 2 type of sales kits which are LUMF and ERLA. 

I need to use the CPFH scenario in my process but I want to use the standard one but even the item category group CPFH is not defined in the Hana system. Do I need to create all settings to use CPFH in my process? Additionally, the sub-item categories are different for the CPFH and DISH too. Is there any reason for we can not use it in the standard SAP system? Thank you

entry.title: Re: Fiserv has a need for pulling users information from...
entry.content:
Using auditing universe, will connect to the auditing database and generate the data as per sample reports attached in the KBA.

All the events that are audited, from the time the auditing is configured, based on that data only, you will get the results.

If you need live records, you can use the CMS DB driver, https://me.sap.com/notes/2369779

entry.title: Re: Looking for Cost effective solution for our Multitena...
entry.content:
Hi Navya,

Indeed there is a limitation and the proposal as Andrew pointed out would be to use a custom domain. Using a Custom Domain would reduce the onboarding activities you need to do when new subscriptions are coming. You don't need to create routes manually, instead wildcard route will handle it.

Best Regards, Pavel

entry.title: Re: Paramter Check in Db2 (db6)
entry.content: Sorry, of course I meant parameter check.

entry.title: How to Remove On-Order stock In MMBE
entry.content:
Hi expert

I am Create and Deleted a  Domestic PO, then a am checking the MMBE Tracsection , There showing     On-order Stock available, But PO already Deleted and have no another Purchase Order.

My requirment , How to remove the On_order Stcok from MMBE Transection screen.

PO already deleted,,,,

Thanks 
M.G Rabbani

entry.title: Re: ​Incident Manager
entry.content:
hello

Nous prendrons en compte que la version que nous allons implémenter est la version S/4 HANA.

entry.title: Re: The Future is Now: Reflections on SAP Data Unleashed 2024
entry.content:
Hello Debashree,

thanks for your summary.

I watched the session, too ... and asked myself if the new features, including AI ... is this really what my customers (small and medium-sized) companies need?

If you talk to them, they would prefer to have and use things, they have been used to for years.

Examples:

- The SAC new model cannot and will never be consumed in Analysis Office 😞 

- The SAC Addin does not offer any VBA functionality 😞

- You still cannot plan data directly into Datasphere 😞

- We are still missing many features on BW Live, which import models provide 😞

- We cannot schedule stories based on Datasphere models 😞

With all that KI discussion nowadays, many people forget what they really distinguish from others, or from machines ... we really learned our job the hard way!

Honestly, I don't know how kids are learning in school today... but if I reflect, I had no google translate, when learning Latin ... I had to gather information in a library 🙂

Just my 2 cents

BR, Martin

entry.title: Unable to Upload Commodity code via XML file.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

When i try to upload the XML file from data provider to update the commodity codes, i get the "Consistency error: Two overlapping instances exist for number XXXXX".

I have also run the /SAPSLL/CTS_WN_REPAIR program to remove the duplicate entries in the system, yet i get this error while uploading the XML files.

Does anyone know this occurs and how to resolve this?

entry.title: Re: WebGUI: 503 Service Not Available / Tenant runlevel s...
entry.content:
SAP WEBGUI is very dependable on the KERNEL version. Example:

Did you have installed the latest patch available for your KERNEL version? Also, please check on the PAM if your OS and KERNEL versions are supported.

entry.title: Re: How to avoid changing amount by data action for data...
entry.content: Yes, I know that. I tried it with an user with Planning Standard license

entry.title: Open Task Button is not working from BTP workzone standard edition - CF
entry.content:
Hi All,

While open the SAP Build Work Zone URL > My Inbox app > Open Task its calling webgui of S4 System. But its should be call the BTP hostname only. Verified all the configuration part like -

Cloud connector : S4 system, Services, Certificates and SubAccount.

BTP : Destination > rt and dt, Connector, User and roles

BWZ : Channel Manager, Content Manager and Site settings

And tried below two notes, but wont work.

3423334 - [My Inbox] Open Task Button is not working from BTP workzone.

2519744 - How to change the domain of the "Open Task" URL to the domain of the Web dispatcher

Can you please suggest me any solution.

Thank you,

Vivaan

SAP Build Work Zone, standard editionSAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environmentSAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

entry.title: Re: Condition Contract - Transfer of settlement documents...
entry.content: I've identified the issue. It was related to a flag on the statistical condition. Setting RES1 in KE4I didn't resolve it, but employing the condition we typically use in COPA (Y005) and marking it as statistical in 0S12 for work and transfer to COPA did the trick.

entry.title: Re: Note 1082841 mmpv error
entry.content:
Dear Dominik Tylczynski,

Can you please explain your solution 

My current Problem

entry.title: Integration of a DM Side-by-Side Extension into Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

i am trying to develop a side-by-side extension for SAP DM.
The Github repo is known and running so far.

My question relates to the integration of the extension into the DM Fiori Launchpad.

Is it possible to put the side-by-side extension as a tile in DM?
What options does SAP provide here?

Calling a side-by-side extension outside the DM context is not a good way for most production managers. It would be desirable to keep everything accessible within one interface (DM Fiori Launchpad).

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Note 1082841 mmpv error
entry.content: Dear Dominik Tylczynski, i also face same issue but i am unable to understand you solution can you please explain more thanks

entry.title: Restrict usage of Document date of closed period
entry.content:
Our Client's requirement is to restrict usage of document date in accounting document which belongs to closed period.

For example, Current period is February 2024 and January 2024 is already closed.

Then system shall not allow to enter document date of January 2024.

Is there any configuration available to satisfy this scenario.

[ Note - We also understand that Document date can be in past.

For example - We can receive vendor invoice with Document date is in past. However still client's requirement is to restrict enetring document date of closed period.]

Kindly let me know if there is any option available to make it happen.

Thank you,

Sumant

entry.title: Re: Created Failed 480000098 - Row in service document mu...
entry.content:
Hi,

I would try to use the template in the DTW folder, keeping the correct column order and see if it makes any difference. 

Series as the first column in the Header (OINV) template seems not ideal, as DocNum is your primary reference and they normally go first in a template. Also, I never pass the Series when it is blank unless you are really posting to a specific one.

Hope it makes sense.

Felipe

entry.title: Re: SAP BI Platform CMS extracts
entry.content: You can use the CMS DB driver, https://me.sap.com/notes/2369779

entry.title: JP5 Data export of large data
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am looking for a way to extract all postings over the last years from the SAP JP5 system. It should be data from all subsidiaries. Because of the large amount of data, a traditional export leads to a system crash.

The reason is that I want to analyze the bookings and search for specific words in the booking like "restructuring". 

Anyone has an idea how I could be able to solve this? Or another way how I can do textual analysis in SAP?

Best regards

Mahdi

 

Basis Technology

entry.title: How I can merge member cell sap sac ?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Have request to show only 1 line total for every combination in table. 

I have Project and Deliverable Dimension. Each project might have 3 deliverables.

Showing them in table will lead to showing 3 lines which I dont want. I need to show only in 1 line. 

Any workaround or idea how to solve this ?

entry.title: Re: Table for Due packages in maintenance plan
entry.content: Thanks for this solution, this was very useful for me!

entry.title: Customer Return stock R8 with Vendor Return
entry.content:
Hi Everybody,

we would like to post a customer return with 651 to a blocked unvaluated stock. In EWM I get stock type R8. But when I create a return PO for the vendor (mvtp 161) I have no chance to refer to the customer return stock in order to get the stock type R8 in my vendor return outbound delivery. Do you know, how I can refer in ERP and finally in ERP to my customer return stock in order to pick the vendor return outbound delivery?

 

Thanks. 

Regards

Daniel

entry.title: Re: Manual Reconciliation help for multiple BP
entry.content:
Hi Holly,

I see your payments are posted as a Journal Entry. Is there a reason behind it? Usually, payments are posted by using Banking > Incoming Payments (AR), Outgoing Payments (AP) or even the Payment Wizard (bulk payment run) where the payment is tied up with the Invoice. When this happens, SAP reconciles the Invoice and Payment automatically so you don't need to worry about doing it manually. See SAP Documentation by clicking on the below:

Incoming Payments | SAP Help Portal

I hope it helps you.

Felipe

entry.title: Re: TEXTs are NOT copied - when copying a material master from another material master
entry.content: Hello ! Did you get any solution ? I am facing the similiar problem.

entry.title: Re: Now available: ABAP Platform Trial
entry.content:
Why the sapstartsrv shows yellow on HANA Studio? 
I already checked everything related to this. Also, the SAP note 1639568. 

I already exposed the ports 50213 and 50214.

Everything else is working as expected...

Or this is a normal behavior @ralf_henning ?

 

All these ports are exposed outside docker and OS

entry.title: MMPV_DATE_CHECK: Error occurred (Note 1082841).
entry.content:
Dear Expert ,

How to Solve this error i am unable to post my GRPO Document due to 

MMPV_DATE_CHECK: Error occurred (Note 1082841).*

*Transaction MMPV (period closing program) cannot be executed. For more information, see Note 1082841*

entry.title: Re: How to Remove On-Order stock In MMBE
entry.content: Since, you have already delete the PO. The on order stock should also gone from MMBE. Please check in MD04 transaction if there is any Open PO?

entry.title: Re: Error when closing production order due to inspection...
entry.content: Hello @janbuchmann, this seemed to work with the FM STATUS_CHANGE_INTERN_VB, don't know the difference from the one you mentioned, but great point anyways. Thank you very much for your help. Appreciate it. Just to mention, we are applying the UD w/o goods movements, so cancelling won't be the way to go in our case.

entry.title: Re: How I can merge member cell sap sac ?
entry.content:
@nasser_itani 

Be default No.

1 project 3 deliverable will make combination of 1X3. 

you need to somehow create a link between deliverable and project either by attributes or dummy facts posting and use booked option to show the right project and deliverable pair combination.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: EWM 1909 identification type for business partners
entry.content: Sorry, I have one question. As part of ZEWMDEBMAS, if we need to send identification type details which is not part of reduced message, how it can be done.

entry.title: Re: How to encrypt and decrypt files using GPG - SAP Commissions
entry.content: Can You please share installation process of GPG on windows?

entry.title: Re: Pick datetime Bugs
entry.content: Hi, put a small Delay in between the selections and the time picker should pop up.

entry.title: Is it safe to use ENQUEUE_ESINDX in S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are migrating to S/4HANA and our ATC lists all usage of ENQUEUE_ESINDX (Used to make sure sure program/table is only used by one person at a time) as priority 1 "error". In the attached SAP Note there's no mention of this FM specifically, it's a general note for SAP S/4HANA custom code adaption - removal of orphaned objects. 

I've tested the programs and this functionality specifically and it's still working just fine. Should I be worried this would be suddenly removed in a minor update in the future?

If I need to address this, what should I use instead of ENQUEUE_ESINDX and DEQUEUE_ESINDX?

Thanks,
Birgir Snorrason

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - IOS SDK version warning
entry.content:
Dear SAP Build Apps Team,

A few of our latest iOS builds returned a warning from Apple mentioning that from April 29, 2024, all iOS apps shall be built with iOS 17SDK or later. While the current SDK in use is iOS 16.2 SDK. 

This post here is just a request and a notification to raise awareness of this issue. 

Best regards.

PS. We just want to avoid last year's case where iOS builds were not accepted by Apple for a few weeks until the issue has been resolved. So we'd be glad if this issue got priority and matched the deadlines set out by Apple.

entry.title: DMO with System Move - Instance Profile Migration for PAS?
entry.content:
Hello, 

I want migrate my System from AnyDB to SAP HANA DB using SUM DMO with System Move. Will the Instance Profile of my old PAS also be migrated, or do I have to migrate the DB-independent Parameters afterwards manually?

Thank you and Kind regards!

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam ABAP: SAP BTP, ABAP Environment & RAP
entry.content: Other than ADT , will there be any pre requisite needed for all attendee?

entry.title: Re: What's up with OpenSAP (Downtime?)
entry.content:
Hi Sebastian,

Same for me. I have tried multiple times today without success. I believe it is unplanned.

UPDATE:

  • using private/internal network (corporate) https://open.sap.com/ is unavailable
  • the site https://open.sap.com/ is available from public network

Regards,
Laszlo

entry.title: How to give interface to external customer to our SAP environment?
entry.content:
We require our External customer to send some information through some web portal to our SAP environment in real time basis. Is there any standard SAP solution available for this so that we can provide login access to vendors through web portal to make some transactions and send data to SAP.

 

Please suggest. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Special stock partner assignment at Ship to party level (Customer Consignments)
entry.content: There's a requirement to assign the special stock partner (SB) at the ship to party level when doing customer consignments. The client requires to see customer consignment stock at the outlets for their chain customers. In the standard partner determination setup, special stock partner function is only allowed at the CUST account type, but not for SHPT (ship to accounts). Is there any way we can get the special stock partner assignment at the ship to level.

entry.title: A day in a life of Sarah, a Production Supervisor using SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Meet Sarah, a Production Supervisor at a high-volume high tech manufacturing plant in US using SAP Digital Manufacturing.

Her day begins with a quick check-in at her desk, a steaming cup of coffee in hand, and a glance at her computer screen.

First stop: Resource Orchestration (aka REO), a cloud-based solution that empowers her to perform last mile scheduling in the shop floor, for the next couple of shifts, taking constraints like equipment, worker, and tools availability into account.

Learn more: 

  • Resource Orchestration within SAP Digital Manufacturing (Incl. Shift Planning and Tools)
  • SAP Digital Manufacturing - Resource Orchestration

Here, Sarah gets a bird's-eye view of the orders lined up for the next shifts. With a few clicks, she schedules operations, adjust workers schedule based on their skills and reserves the tools needed, and releases production orders to the shop floor, so the manufacturing process can start.

Learn more: 

  • Tool Management within SAP Digital Manufacturing
  • SAP Digital Manufacturing Tool Management, Scheduling and Usage Tracking
  • SAP Digital Manufacturing: A Deep Dive into Tool Management Capabilities

As the day progresses, Sarah keeps a close eye on Line Monitor POD. This handy tool gives her real-time updates on Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE) KPIs and live monitoring of the shop floor. It's like having a window into the heart of the operation, allowing her to spot any issues and make adjustments on the fly.

Today, however, Sarah notices a blip on the radar – the quality KPI is lower than usual.

Learn more: 

  • SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights
  • SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights Overview

Concerned, she investigates the problem deeper, pulling up existing standard reports for order progress and traceability information.

Learn more: 

  • SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights
  • SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights Overview

 

She then turns to embedded SAC dashboards, where she finds comprehensive information on component consumption, defects, nonconformances, rework, traceability and visual inspection results.

Learn more: 

  • SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights
  • SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights Overview

With this information on hands, Sarah works together with her team of data scientists to analise the root cause of the issue by leveraging the latest visual inspection results, powered by AI.

Together, they get to the bottom of the problem and takes immediate actions to address it by training an improved AI/ML model and deploying it to the shop floor, so this new type of defect can be identified earlier.

Learn more: AI-driven Visual Inspection (BETA) powered by SAP

As the day goes by, her efforts pay off – the quality KPI starts to climb again, getting back closer to where it needs to be.

With a sense of accomplishment, Sarah closes out the day knowing that she's not only met but exceeded all production and KPI targets.

In a world where every minute counts and every decision matters, Sarah is the hero, using the power of SAP Digital Manufacturing to keep operations running smoothly and efficiently.

As she shuts down her computer and heads home, she can't help but feel a sense of pride in a job well done.

Experiencing SAP Digital Manufacturing

You can have a glimpse and experience several aspects of SAP Digital Manufacturing via the Interactive Value Journeys below:

Discrete within SAP Digital Manufacturing and S/4HANA Cloud
Process Industry within SAP Digital Manufacturing and S/4HANA Cloud
Tool Management within SAP Digital Manufacturing
Resource Orchestration within SAP Digital Manufacturing
Production Process Design within SAP Digital Manufacturing
Shop Floor Orchestration with SAP Digital Manufacturing
Time Tracking within SAP Digital Manufacturing
SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights
Nonconformances Processes within SAP Digital Manufacturing


Do you like this post? Please let me know in the comments section what you think. Any feedback is highly appreciated.

Or, if you have any questions, please check SAP Community Q&A Area, or comment down below.

Thanks,
Manoel Costa

entry.title: Re: What's up with OpenSAP (Downtime?)
entry.content:
same for me -  seems to be unavailable for several days  https://www.saashub.com/opensap-status
any expectation @Laszlo_Thoma    when this will be resolved ?

entry.title: EMIGALL: Property Start Date is coming as System Date
entry.content:
When the properties are getting created in SAP from Conversion using EMIGALL object - PROPERTY, the start date of property is coming as System Date instead of the actual start date which is available in Legacy.
How can the property start date set as actual date instead of the system date?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: EMIGALL: Property Start Date is coming as System Date
entry.content:
By default, this field is set to the system date, but it can be customized as per your requirements.
To change the date, please follow these steps:

1. Open the service function module interface (EMIGALL -> Migration Object -> Change -> Interface button).
2. Locate the parameter X_KEYDATE and update it from SY-DATUM to AUTO-EPROPD-KEYDATE.
3. If necessary, make changes to the KEYDATE field in the EPROD automation data structure.

entry.title: Re: WebGUI: 503 Service Not Available / Tenant runlevel s...
entry.content:
I#ll went through different manuals and checked everything double times.

It had used a port that was probably already used. Now i changed to another port and now the icf service entries show as activated i can now acess via webbrowser, resulting after some minutes in a another error.

500 Connection timed out

entry.title: Re: Move one subaccount from one global account to anothe...
entry.content:
Hello @ohisler 

SAP Note 3041304 also complements Note shared by Marty although with a different request, shares the manual activities that need to be performed to migrate services from one subaccount to another, after the Replacement Order for the new GLobal Account. 

There are services that allow simple download/export to then be imported easily into the new subaccount but the majority requires manual setup of respective services, instances, token setup, etc. 

Thank you

Tiago Ribeiro

entry.title: Re: Premium Hub CoE – DSC Knowledge Bits – How to mass-upload transportation lanes and zones

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: ZOOM VLS integration with SuccessFactors Learning
entry.content:
I receive th efollowing error: 


Validation Error
Please correct the following errors before proceeding:

The user account could not be created on ZOOM VLS VLS Server. Please try again later or note the error and contact your VLS administrator.
VLS Error: Bad Request Invalid access token, does not contain scopes:[user:write:admin, user_info:read, user:read:admin, user_profile, user:read, user:write].

entry.title: Re: Staging bay not assigned to ODO or WT when door assig...
entry.content: /scwm/stadet_ass is missing an entry. You should have warehouse process type and door detr group as well.

entry.title: 1H 2024 Product Release upgrades already in Production
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Have any of you experienced that upgrades from 1H 2024 Product Release are already in Production instance? We are more than 2 months before Production release, but some of them are live.

  • Development Goals subsection and block visible in People Profile. That was not the case previously. I have full admin permissions, but once this block appeared it says: "You don’t have the necessary permission. Please contact your administrator for help." This is totally new thing in people profile and that's why admin permissions were not configured yet.
  • MDF Permissions column in Role Based Permission: Permission to User domain in Report Center. It was presented in SAP SuccessFactors 1H 2024 Release Preview Webinar as new feature of 1H 2024 Release, but it is already available on Production.
  • We disabled Latest Applicant Workbench just after 2H 2023 Release, but couple days ago it was automatically enabled again.

We already reported that to our Customer Success Manager, but no replay yet. Please let me know if you experienced similar strange changes in your Production instances.

Thank you,

Damian

entry.title: Re: WebGUI: 503 Service Not Available / Tenant runlevel s...
entry.content:
On the search for the timeout problem i cleared the >ICM Trace-File, restarted the ICM and checked the Trace File.

There are peer SSL-Errors listed, even i had not tried to connect via Browser after the restart, so i gues that could be a problem of a internal communication?

Can someone explain me where that SSL-error is coming from?
